name: Sensei Rainbow and the Dojo Kids
original_name: Sensei Rainbow and the Dojo Kids
overview: Join Sensei Rainbow, the Dojo Kids, and Yin and Yang, their enchanted dragon friends in their karate adventure. Sing along, dance and train the martial arts. In this pilot for kids, the mission is to encourage and support Danny, a small boy with a big basketball.

trailers.title: Sensei Rainbow and the Dojo Kids
